provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they hold Belgian nationality.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_citizen_of_union.name: is_citizen_of_union
is_citizen_of_union.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_community_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
falls_under_community_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a national of a third country: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

is_present_on_territory.name: is_present_on_territory
is_present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_resid.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

is_in_illegal_residence.name: is_in_illegal_residence
is_in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence: present on the territory without satisfying access or residence conditions.

is_subject_to_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_to_removal_procedure
is_subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

is_subject_to_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_to_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_to_international_protection_p.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.name: is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure
is_subject_to_dublin_transfer_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the foreigner is current and real.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria is met for the foreigner.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, established after individual examination on the basis of at least one objective criterion.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_country_author.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_c.name: falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_under_laissez_passer_nationality_c.description: The foreigner falls under a category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The foreigner is identified: holds a valid travel document, has been recognised by their national authority, or falls under a laissez-passer nationality category.

absconding_criterion_1_met.name: absconding_criterion_1_met
absconding_criterion_1_met.description: Criterion 1: the foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not submit an application for international protection within the legally required period.

absconding_criterion_2_met.name: absconding_criterion_2_met
absconding_criterion_2_met.description: Criterion 2: the foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

absconding_criterion_3_met.name: absconding_criterion_3_met
absconding_criterion_3_met.description: Criterion 3: the foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

absconding_criterion_4_met.name: absconding_criterion_4_met
absconding_criterion_4_met.description: Criterion 4: the foreigner has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, liberty-restricting, or equivalent measure.

absconding_criterion_5_met.name: absconding_criterion_5_met
absconding_criterion_5_met.description: Criterion 5: the foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

absconding_criterion_6_met.name: absconding_criterion_6_met
absconding_criterion_6_met.description: Criterion 6: the foreigner submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a refusal, end-of-residence decision, or pushback/removal measure.

absconding_criterion_7_met.name: absconding_criterion_7_met
absconding_criterion_7_met.description: Criterion 7: the foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

absconding_criterion_8_met.name: absconding_criterion_8_met
absconding_criterion_8_met.description: Criterion 8: the foreigner submitted multiple international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

absconding_criterion_9_met.name: absconding_criterion_9_met
absconding_criterion_9_met.description: Criterion 9: the foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

absconding_criterion_10_met.name: absconding_criterion_10_met
absconding_criterion_10_met.description: Criterion 10: the foreigner declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those stated in their international protection or residence application.

absconding_criterion_11_met.name: absconding_criterion_11_met
absconding_criterion_11_met.description: Criterion 11: the foreigner is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry
did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

did_not_submit_international_protection_.name: did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time
did_not_submit_international_protection_.description: The foreigner did not submit an application for international protection within the period provided by law.

used_false_information_or_documents.name: used_false_information_or_documents
used_false_information_or_documents.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information or false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.name: committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means
committed_fraud_or_unlawful_means.description: The foreigner committed fraud or used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_transfer_pushback_removal
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.description: The foreigner indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, pushback, or removal measure.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_entry.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_entry.description: The foreigner indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.description: The foreigner indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, pushback, or removal.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_liber.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_liber.description: The foreigner indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.description: The foreigner indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to criterion 4 measures.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_after_negative.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_after_negative.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a refusal, end-of-residence decision, or pushback/removal measure.

concealed_fingerprints_in_dublin_state.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_dublin_state
concealed_fingerprints_in_dublin_state.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State after submitting an international protection application.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcomes
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The foreigner submitted multiple international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_protection_application_i.name: concealed_prior_protection_application_in_dublin_state
concealed_prior_protection_application_i.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_a.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_stated_in_a.description: The foreigner declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those stated in their international protection or residence application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.
